summary: Frontend testing for Pass-e-port travel app iteration 4 - All requested features verified working. Seasons page shows only PEAK season countries in category tabs, Trip Cost Estimator button visible and has 70+ countries, Country Detail Modal shows festivals (Songkran, Loi Krathong for Thailand) and dishes with descriptions (Pad Thai - Stir-fried noodles), Safety & Emergency page fully functional with emergency numbers and Indian Embassy info, Map zoom controls working, Greenland shows data on weather map (white/snow color).
passed_tests: Seasons page loads with Trip Cost Estimator button visible
Category tabs show only PEAK season countries: All (60), Beach (13), Mountain (3), City (9), Culture (16), Adventure (11), Nature (11)
Beach filter correctly shows 13 PEAK season beach destinations (Thailand, UAE, New Zealand, Mexico)
Mountain filter correctly shows 3 PEAK season mountain destinations (India, Nepal, Bhutan)
Trip Cost Estimator modal opens with 70 countries (exceeds 60+ requirement)
Cost Estimator countries include A-Z range: Argentina to Vietnam
Country Detail Modal opens quickly for Thailand
Thailand modal shows festivals: Songkran (Apr), Loi Krathong (Nov)
Thailand modal shows dishes with descriptions: Pad Thai - Stir-fried noodles, Tom Yum - Spicy sour soup
Japan modal shows festivals: Sapporo Snow Festival, Cherry Blossom Festival, Awa Odori
Japan modal shows dishes: Sushi, Ramen, Tempura, Mochi with descriptions
Safety & Emergency page accessible from navigation menu
Safety page shows color-coded map with 5 safety levels + No Data
30 safety country cards displayed
Japan safety card expands to show: Police (110), Ambulance (119), Fire (119), General (119)
Japan safety card shows Indian Embassy: +81-3-3262-2391, Tokyo address
Thailand safety card shows: Police (191), Ambulance (1669), Fire (199), General (1155)
Thailand safety card shows Indian Embassy: +66-2-258-0300, Bangkok address
Safety page has Safety Tips section for each country
Map zoom controls (+, -, reset) present on all map pages
Greenland shows data on Weather page (white/snow color, not grey)
Festivals page shows 117 festivals with good map coverage
Navigation menu shows Safety & Emergency link with Shield icon
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from iteration 4 working correctly: Category tabs show only PEAK season countries, Cost Estimator has 70 countries (expanded from 24), Country Detail Modal loads quickly with festivals and dishes including descriptions, Safety & Emergency page shows emergency numbers (Police, Ambulance, Fire) and Indian Embassy contact info, Greenland shows weather data (snow/cold). Note: Weather API is slow (~18s) but modal loads other data first. Backend has 199 seasons, 117 festivals, 90 dishes, 63 safety records.
mocked_apis_note: No mocked APIs - all backend data is live. Cost Estimator uses frontend hardcoded data (70 countries).
